title: Add role-based pagination to API client
discovery: TaskForge monorepo with shared types in packages/shared, API client in packages/api-client, business logic in packages/business-logic. The listTasks method is in api-client/src/client.ts. Types are in shared/src/types.ts. No existing pagination utility.

steps.title: Add pagination types to shared package
steps.description: Add PaginationParams and PaginatedResponse<T> types to shared/src/types.ts and corresponding Zod schemas to shared/src/schemas.ts

progress.item: Add PaginatedResponse<T> generic type to types.ts

steps.result: Added PaginationParams (page, pageSize) and PaginatedResponse<T> (items, totalCount, page, pageSize, totalPages) to types.ts. Added corresponding Zod schemas. Exported from index.ts.

steps.title: Add paginateResults utility to business-logic
steps.description: Create a paginateResults<T> function in business-logic that takes an array and PaginationParams, returns PaginatedResponse<T>
steps.result: Created pagination.ts with generic paginateResults<T> function. Validates inputs, computes totalPages with Math.ceil. Tests cover empty arrays, single page, multi-page, edge cases.

steps.title: Update API client listTasks to support pagination
steps.description: Update listTasks method in api-client/src/client.ts to accept optional PaginationParams and return PaginatedResponse<Task>

progress.item: Update listTasks signature to accept PaginationParams
Update listTasks to pass pagination params as query string
Update client tests for paginated responses

steps.title: Verify all changes compile and tests pass
steps.description: Run typecheck and tests across the monorepo to verify nothing is broken

completedSummary: Step 1: Added PaginationParams and PaginatedResponse types + Zod schemas to shared package
Step 2: Created paginateResults utility in business-logic with full test coverage
